Founder's Operations Self-Audit Checklist

Use this preview to see where the company is still held together by founder bandwidth, weak handoffs, or a stack that adds more drag than leverage.

  1. Which decisions still come back to the founder every week?
  2. Where does work wait because ownership is unclear?
  3. Which recurring requests require a developer or founder to pull data manually?
  4. Which tools hold duplicated or contradictory customer data?
  5. Which process breaks first when sales volume increases?
  6. Where could AI review, route, summarize, or assemble evidence before a human decides?

Book a systems audit when one of those questions points at real drag.
